tip_1: 1. Check if the 'GB Stream Address' can be accessed by the monitoring device
tip_2: 2. Can ZLM access gowvp? For Docker merged version, use 127.0.0.1. For separate deployment, use explicit IP address
label_hint: Click a colored cell to add a label
camera_hint: Click a colored cell to place a camera
select_hint: Select mode: drag walls, handles, or cameras after clicking them
wall_hint: Wall tool: click and drag to draw a wall
camera_place_hint: Camera mode: click to place a camera and snap it to the grid
pan_hint_v2: Pan mode: drag with left button. Middle mouse drag works in every mode
middle_pan_hint: Middle mouse drag is available in every mode
double_click_finish_wall: Double-click or right-click to finish the current wall chain
no_camera_selected: Select a camera on the canvas first
selection_empty_description: No camera is selected. Use the wall or camera tools to edit the plan.
select_hint_v2: Select mode: drag walls, wall endpoints, or cameras directly
wall_drag_hint: Wall tool: draw walls at any angle by default. Hold Shift to constrain them horizontally or vertically while still snapping to the grid
room_drag_hint: Room tool: click and drag once to create a rectangular room outline
preset_description: Insert a common outline with one click, then fine-tune it by dragging walls.
preset_hint: Quick presets and rectangle drag-draw are supported
wall_edit_tip: Drag the whole wall to move it. Drag either endpoint handle for fine tuning.
selection_empty_description_v2: Choose Wall / Rectangle Room / Camera to start editing, or insert a preset shape from the right panel.
grouped_selection_hint: Grouped items move together. Hold Ctrl/Cmd + left click to add or remove items from the selection.
grouped_item_hint: This item belongs to a group. Clicking any item in the group selects and drags the whole group.
single_item_hint: Hold Ctrl/Cmd + left click for multi-select, or select multiple items first and then group them.
multi_select_hint: Hold Ctrl/Cmd + left click for multi-select, then drag any selected item to move all of them
selection_empty_description_v3: Choose Wall / Room / Camera to start editing. Hold Ctrl/Cmd + left click for multi-select, then group items to drag them together.
box_select_hint: Drag on empty space to box-select, hold Ctrl/Cmd to add to the selection
shift_drag_hint: Hold Shift while drawing walls, dragging a batch, or moving a wall endpoint to constrain movement horizontally or vertically
select_all_hint: Ctrl/Cmd + A selects all, arrow keys nudge by grid, Shift + arrows moves faster
copy_paste_hint: Ctrl/Cmd + C copies, Ctrl/Cmd + V pastes, Ctrl/Cmd + D quickly duplicates the current selection
alt_drag_hint: In select mode, hold Alt while dragging to duplicate the current selection and move the copy
channel_load_warning: The channel list may be incomplete. The current result already falls back to the safest available data.
